reason: Browser use feature successfully executes browser commands via agent chat and returns expected page title
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully showing Super Agent interface with sidebar containing three agents
Found and clicked "QA-20260416-024302-xnfy" agent in sidebar — Agent opened successfully, displaying chat interface with empty sessions and input field

Sent message "Open a browser and go to https://example.com. Tell me the page title." — Message sent successfully, agent status changed to "working", session created named "Browser Page Title Verification"
Waited up to 3 minutes for response — Agent completed task in 14 seconds, response appeared in chat

Verified response mentions "Example Domain" — Response clearly states: "The page title is "Example Domain". It's a simple page with a heading and a "Learn more" link." with green checkmarks on all tool actions (Open Browser, Page Snapshot, Close Browser)
Took screenshot — Screenshot captured showing complete response with "Example Domain" visible in agent's message
